data.title: Walmart Targets Amazon's Biggest Edge With Aggressive Delivery Overhaul
data.description: Walmart Inc. is taking bold steps to narrow the gap with Amazon.com Inc. by accelerating deliveries, expanding its marketplace, and capitalizing on strong consumer demand. The company is piloting a new strategy utilizing store back rooms to store products from third-party sellers, with the goal of offering quicker delivery, potentially including same-day service. These trials are currently being conducted in select Dallas stores, enhancing their current operations where stores serve as local fulfillment centers and manage to deliver over 33% of online orders within 3 hours. The move to bring marketplace inventory closer to customers is aimed at reducing delivery times compared to shipments from external facilities or sellers. This initiative is part of Walmart's larger strategy to compete with Amazon and cater to evolving customer preferences. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: The evolution of expense management tools in 2026: Findity AB
data.description: Findity, a prominent provider of embedded expense management, has released its State of Expense Management 2026 report, which analyzes the expense management trends across nine European markets. The report covers countries including the Nordics, the UK, and Germany. Released on April 20, 2026, the findings outline key insights into the current landscape of expense management in these regions.

data.title: Best Eyeglasses Online (2026): EZContacts Selected for Competitive Pricing and Authentic Brands by Consumer365
data.description: Online shopping has revolutionized the way consumers buy eyewear in recent years. A recent article from Consumer365 discusses this trend and singles out EZContacts as a standout online seller known for its competitive prices and extensive range of authentic designer glasses. The article points out that the online retailer has seen a significant increase in sales, with a reported surge of 30% in orders over the past year. This shift towards online eyewear shopping is reshaping the industry, with EZContacts leading the charge with its customer-friendly approach and diverse product offerings.

data.title: Novo Nordisk: Etavopivat is the first in a new class of drugs to meet both co-primary endpoints in the phase 3 HIBISCUS trial, substantially reducing vaso-occlusive crisis events and improving haemoglobin response in sickle cell disease
data.description: Novo Nordisk, a pharmaceutical company based in Bagsværd, Denmark, has revealed the key findings from the HIBISCUS trial conducted on April 20, 2026. This pivotal phase 3 study focused on once-daily oral etavopivat and its impact on individuals with sickle cell disease (SCD), comprising adults and adolescents. The results indicated a significant achievement, with etavopivat meeting the primary goals set for the trial. It demonstrated notable superiority in reducing vaso-occlusive crises (VOCs) and enhancing the haemoglobin (Hb) response compared to the placebo group. This promising outcome suggests a potential breakthrough in the treatment of SCD, offering new hope for patients.

data.title: BIS cautions about impacts of US dollar stablecoins on banks. Urges international cooperation in regulation - Hernández de Cos.
data.description: Pablo Hernández de Cos, the General Manager of the Bank for International Settlements, has expressed concerns regarding the potential risks to financial stability posed by US dollar stablecoins. He emphasized the need for enhanced global coordination in regulating stablecoins. This statement underscores the growing importance of addressing stablecoin risks, with de Cos advocating for stronger oversight and regulation in this rapidly evolving sector. Global cooperation in this endeavor is crucial, given the widespread use and potential impact of stablecoins on the financial system. The call for increased regulatory measures follows reports of stablecoins gaining popularity, with notable figures in the financial sector, including de Cos, raising alarm about the stability and oversight of these digital assets. As the use of stablecoins continues to rise, the need for a coordinated regulatory approach becomes more pressing to safeguard financial stability. De Cos's remarks highlight the urgency of establishing robust oversight mechanisms to monitor and address potential risks associated with stablecoins.

data.title: Wintrust Financial Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: After market close on April 20, Wintrust Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: WTFC) is set to report its first-quarter earnings. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.96 per share, a rise from the previous year's $2.69 per share. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of approximately $707.92 million, an increase from the $643.11 million reported last year. Recently, Wintrust Financial disclosed the retirement of board members H. Patrick Hackett Jr. and William J. Doyle. Following this news, Wintrust Financial's stock price climbed 2% to close at $148.17 on Friday. For further details, including the latest analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Sight Machine Advances Autonomous Agents for Manufacturing with AI Agent Crews
data.description: In Hannover, Germany on April 20, 2026, Sight Machine Inc., a top industrial AI platform, has launched autonomous agentic operations in manufacturing. This new system involves crews of autonomous AI agents that are dedicated to monitoring and optimizing production processes continuously. These agents work non-stop to ensure efficient and effective operations. This innovation signifies a significant step towards automation in the manufacturing industry and highlights the importance of AI in enhancing productivity.
